description: Add a numeric field named 'GDP_PCAP' (Type: Double, Length: 20, Precision: 2) to the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer. Calculate the GDP per capita for each country using the formula (GDP_MD_EST * 1000000) / POP_EST, where GDP_MD_EST represents the estimated GDP in millions of dollars and POP_EST is the population count. Save the calculated values to the layer.
